channel.title: Comments on: bbCumulus Plugin (beta) for bbPress released!

item.title: By: Carlos
item.dc:creator: Carlos
item.description:
Hello Gautam,
I'm using your bb-cumulus, and is really beatifull control the settings, but since I activate the plugin appear on the top of the page this message :
Warning: is_readable() [function.is-readable]: open_basedir restriction in effect. File(/my-plugins/bb-cumulus/languages/bb-cumulus-en_US.mo) is not within the allowed path(s): (/usr/home/designemergente.org/:/usr/home/phpMyAdmin-plan6/:/usr/home/webstats/) in /usr/home/designemergente.org/web/foro/bb-includes/functions.bb-l10n.php on line 384
could You help me Please? best Kind Regards.
item.content:encoded:
Hello Gautam,

I’m using your bb-cumulus, and is really beatifull control the settings, but since I activate the plugin appear on the top of the page this message :

Warning: is_readable() [function.is-readable]: open_basedir restriction in effect. File(/my-plugins/bb-cumulus/languages/bb-cumulus-en_US.mo) is not within the allowed path(s): (/usr/home/designemergente.org/:/usr/home/phpMyAdmin-plan6/:/usr/home/webstats/) in /usr/home/designemergente.org/web/foro/bb-includes/functions.bb-l10n.php on line 384

could You help me Please?
best
Kind Regards.
